# UC-10.17.15 · SonicWall High Availability State Machine and Failover Events (SonicWall)

## Description

Missed HA failovers leave a false sense of redundancy. Event monitoring validates that standby units actually take over.

## Value

Protects revenue and remote access during hardware failure or maintenance.

## Implementation

Label units by cluster ID. Alert on flapping roles within 15 minutes.

## SPL

```spl
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)High Availability|HA |Active|Idle|heartbeat")
| stats count values(_raw) as msgs latest(_time) as last by host, ha_peer
| sort -last
```

## Visualization

Timeline (HA state), table (unit, role, last failover).

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
